meta.generator: MAP Airtable CSV to MAP JSON Python Script

properties.description: Schema containing the minimal query substrate (QueryDance, request/graph/step, bindings, and execution state) needed for the SeedHolons + Expand QueryDance vertical slice.
Fixed-shape request holon supplied to a QueryDance. Names the symbolic plan to execute and the caller-supplied initial runtime bindings.
Concrete dance response type for query execution. Its response body is a HolonCollection; diagnostics and status live at the dance-response layer.

Symbolic query plan: a reusable, saveable artifact describing what a query means. Owns its steps, its declared input bindings, and its single declared result binding. Carries no runtime execution state.

An operation node in a QueryGraph. Names its operation kind, optional parameters, predecessor steps, an optional request-supplied initial binding (root steps only), and an optional symbolic output binding.

Abstract holon type describing a family of query-step operations. Its small semantic contract is an optional input collection type, a result collection type, and an optional parameter projection type.
Symbolic-only binding: the variable name used by a query plan. It does not carry a runtime collection; that association is made by ExecutionBinding.
Runtime binding associating a symbolic QueryBinding with a concrete HolonCollection. Supplied as an initial binding on a request and tracked on an ExecutionInstance during a run.
One ephemeral runtime execution of one QueryDanceRequest. Owns the request it executes, the live runtime bindings, execution status, and the final result collection.
Parameter projection for an Expand step. Carries the name of the MAP relationship channel to traverse.
Concrete dance type for graph query execution. Its dance input is a QueryDanceRequest and its response is a QueryDanceResponse. Ordinarily afforded by HolonSpace.
properties.dance_description: Executes a symbolic QueryGraph against an affording holon, producing a HolonCollection result.

properties.description: Concrete query step kind that seeds an execution with a starting HolonCollection. Takes no input collection; produces a HolonCollection.
Concrete query step kind that follows a named MAP relationship channel. Consumes a HolonCollection, takes ExpandParameters, and produces a HolonCollection.
Human-facing name of a QueryGraph.
Human-readable description of what a QueryGraph means.
Symbolic variable name carried by a QueryBinding.
Ordinal position of a QueryStep within its QueryGraph.
Optional human-readable label for a QueryStep.
Status of an ExecutionInstance, recorded as an ExecutionStatus enum value.
Enum value type for the lifecycle status of an ExecutionInstance.
Execution has been created but not yet started.
Execution is in progress.
Execution finished successfully.
Execution terminated with a failure.
Links a QueryDanceRequest to the symbolic QueryGraph it executes.
Inverse of QueryGraph, from QueryGraph to QueryDanceRequest.
Links a QueryDanceRequest to the caller-supplied initial ExecutionBindings that seed the run.
Inverse of InitialBindings, from ExecutionBinding to QueryDanceRequest.
Links a QueryGraph to the QuerySteps that make up its plan body.
Inverse of QuerySteps, from QueryStep to QueryGraph.
Links a QueryGraph to the symbolic QueryBindings it declares as its external input contract.
Inverse of DeclaredInputBindings, from QueryBinding to QueryGraph.
Links a QueryGraph to the single QueryBinding designated as its exported result.
Inverse of DeclaredResultBinding, from QueryBinding to QueryGraph.
Links a QueryStep to the QueryStepKind describing its operation.
Inverse of StepKind, from QueryStepKind to QueryStep.
Lets a root QueryStep name the request-supplied initial QueryBinding it consumes.
Inverse of UsesInitialBinding, from QueryBinding to QueryStep.
Optionally attaches a symbolic QueryBinding name to a QueryStep's output.
Inverse of StepOutputBinding, from QueryBinding to QueryStep.
Links a QueryStep to the Projection holding its operation parameters.
Inverse of StepParameters, from Projection to QueryStep.
Links a QueryStep to the predecessor QuerySteps whose output it consumes. This is the normal structural flow mechanism between steps.
Inverse of StepDependsOn, from a QueryStep to the successor QuerySteps that depend on it.
Links a QueryStepKind to the HolonCollection type it consumes as input.
Inverse of StepInputType, from HolonCollection to QueryStepKind.
Links a QueryStepKind to the HolonCollection type it produces as its result.
Inverse of StepResultType, from HolonCollection to QueryStepKind.
Links a QueryStepKind to the Projection type it expects as its parameters.
Inverse of StepParameterType, from Projection to QueryStepKind.
Links an ExecutionInstance to the QueryDanceRequest it is executing.
Inverse of ExecutesRequest, from QueryDanceRequest to ExecutionInstance.
Links an ExecutionInstance to its live runtime ExecutionBindings.
Inverse of ExecutionBindings, from ExecutionBinding to ExecutionInstance.
Links an ExecutionBinding to the symbolic QueryBinding (variable) it binds.
Inverse of BindsQueryVariable, from QueryBinding to ExecutionBinding.
Links an ExecutionBinding to the runtime HolonCollection it binds its variable to.
Inverse of BoundCollection, from HolonCollection to ExecutionBinding.
Links an ExecutionInstance to the final HolonCollection result of the run.
Inverse of ExecutionResult, from HolonCollection to ExecutionInstance.
